pages.text: A relic of pure divinity, vibrating with a frequency that nullifies entropy. It is capable of activating the $(l:patchouli:machines/pyramid_core)Pyramid Core$() structure without being consumed in the process.$()$(br)$()This is a $(4)CRITICAL EARLY GAME$() item - craft it BEFORE building your pyramid to activate it infinitely!

pages.title: Usage
pages.text: Simply right-click on a $(l:patchouli:machines/pyramid_core)Pyramid Core$() with the Ancient Ankh to activate it. The pyramid will produce entropy continuously as long as it remains active.$()$(br)$()Note: You must also have $(item)Entropy Biomass$() in the pyramid's inventory for it to function, unless you also add $(item)Inertial Stability Alloy$() for truly infinite power!
